summary: Phase F Canonical Drawer UI Testing Complete. All 6 migrated drawers verified using StandardDrawerShell: AdminDiscountRequests, CustomerOrders, CustomerInvoices, SalesOrderDrawerV2, AssignmentDecisionDrawer (via code review), DetailDrawer (wrapper). All drawers have consistent header (title+subtitle+badge+close), scrollable body, sticky footer where applicable, backdrop with blur, ESC key handling, and body scroll lock. Regression tests passed for Phase E discount APIs and Phase C.5 reorder API. Auth security forgot-password still working.
critical_code_review_comments: StandardDrawerShell component is well-structured with proper ESC key handling, body scroll lock, and backdrop click functionality
All migrated drawers correctly use data-testid attributes for testing
DetailDrawer wrapper correctly normalizes width prop from Tailwind classes to StandardDrawerShell width enum
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase F Canonical Drawer UI migration verified. All drawers support: ESC key close, backdrop click close, sticky footer (where applicable), scrollable body. StandardDrawerShell is the canonical component at /app/frontend/src/components/ui/StandardDrawerShell.jsx
